target: 1_长程对话中的交互式记忆评测_Jiayang Cheng_20260702_234408\section_02.tex

findings.location: subsection: diagnostic metrics：把失败拆成写、读、用
findings.issue: The diagnostic metrics discussion is structurally a continuation of stage three, but it is promoted to the same heading level as the three stages. This slightly weakens the hierarchy because the section title promises a three-stage framework while a fourth peer subsection appears after the stages.
findings.recommendation: Nest diagnostic metrics under stage three or explicitly frame it as the evaluation layer's diagnostic extension.

findings.location: 阶段二：让 agent 与 user simulator 形成 on-policy 轨迹
findings.issue: The sentence claiming open-ended chat has little teaching value is stronger than the surrounding evidence in the supplied text. It may be faithful to the intended interpretation, but the artifact itself does not support it clearly.
findings.recommendation: Tie the claim to the framework's purpose: uncontrolled open-ended chat reduces traceability and diagnostic value.

findings.issue: The section uses a strong conclusion-first opening, then develops motivation, mechanism, examples, figures, diagnostic implications, and takeaway. It avoids a chronological transcript dump and keeps terminology mostly consistent.
findings.recommendation: No required change for pass status.

audit.evaluation_context: Teaching-PDF section checkpoint: validate Pyramid Principle structure, source faithfulness to inspected subtitles, terminology consistency, learner-facing progression, figure support, and no chronological transcript dump.
